'''Blue lizards''' were reptilian quadrupeds that lived on the forest moon of [[Endor/Legends|Endor]]. A line of spikes ran along their back, from the top of their head to the end of their tail.

{{Creature-stub}}

*[[Droids (1986) 4|''Droids'' (1986) 4]] {{1st}}
